rulings.Case Title: FRANK RICCO VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Order To: (1) Vacate December 9, 2009, Order To Stay Or Dismiss Matter On Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens; And (2) Reinstate This California Matter To The Civil Active Docket
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, May 18, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff FRANK RICCO¿s motion for order to (1) vacate December 9, 2009 order to stay or dismiss matter on grounds of forum non conveniens, and (2) reinstate the California matter to the civil active docket is denied without prejudice to refilling the motion if the notice of motion states that plaintiff seeks to lift the stay rather than vacate the stay order. Plaintiff¿s notice of motion and initial memorandum state that he seeks to vacate Judge Alvarado¿s order. Vacating an order is qualitatively different from lifting a stay. While plaintiff¿s reply memorandum states that he wishes to lift the stay, the relief sought in the notice of motion controls. (See CRC 3.1110(a)). =(220/HEK)
